# Anton Alenev — Personal Portfolio & Blog

> Anton Alenev (online handles: AntonLenev, m0rg0t) is a Russian software developer,
> cosplayer, audiobook narrator, and podcast host based in Rybinsk, Russia.
> This site is his personal portfolio and blog covering programming, creative projects,
> cosplay, and media production. Primary language: Russian, with an English mirror at /en.

## About

- [Home](https://alenev.ru/): Portfolio overview and social links for Anton Alenev.
- [Home (English)](https://alenev.ru/en): English-language version of the site.

## IT & Programming

- [IT Projects](https://alenev.ru/it): Articles, presentations and open-source projects
  by Anton Alenev covering software development, AI tooling, TypeScript, Node.js,
  web apps, VK Mini Apps, and Yandex skills.

## Podcasts

- [Podcasts](https://alenev.ru/podcasts): Episodes of "Косплей и прочие штуки"
  (Cosplay and Other Things) — a podcast hosted by Anton Alenev covering cosplay,
  technology, and creative topics.

## Audiobooks

- [Audiobooks](https://alenev.ru/audiobooks): Catalog of audiobooks narrated by Anton Alenev,
  available on the Litres platform.

## Cosplay

- [Cosplay](https://alenev.ru/cosplay): Photography, build logs, and event coverage of
  Anton Alenev's cosplay work — costumes of characters from games, films, and comics.

## Publications

- [Publications](https://alenev.ru/publications): Bylined articles and media mentions
  featuring Anton Alenev.

## Other Projects

- [Other](https://alenev.ru/other): VK Mini Apps, Yandex skills, and miscellaneous projects.

## Social & Contact

- GitHub: https://github.com/m0rg0t
- Telegram: https://t.me/AntonLenev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/anton-lenev-98414530/
- VK: https://vk.com/m0rg0t
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/antonlenev/
- Twitter/X: https://twitter.com/m0rg0t
